strengths: ~15 years of broad full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience
Founder of open-source GIS platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth or shipped AI products at scale

response.justification: Candidate brings ~15 years of versatile full-stack and infrastructure engineering across multiple domains, with founder experience and recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the resume shows limited evidence of recognized AI expertise, large-scale AI product delivery, or director-level IC influence expected for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy.
